AI Food Tracking for iOS

Snap a Meal. Know Your Macros.

Yapper reads your food from a photo in seconds, then backs it up with voice, text, and barcode logging when life gets messy.

★★★★★ 4.8 · Used by 2,400+ users · Free to start

Today 09:41
1,420 Kcal left
Protein 82 / 150g
Carbs 128 / 210g
Fat 41 / 70g

Logging should not feel like admin.

Searching databases kills motivation

Endless variants and weak search make calorie tracking feel like data entry instead of progress.

Manual logging steals your time

Typing every meal adds up fast, especially when all you want is a quick answer after you eat.

Most apps are bloated by default

Feeds, ads, and overbuilt dashboards get in the way. Yapper stays focused on the only job that matters.

Zero to logged in three beats.

01

Take a photo of your food

Capture the meal as it is, with no need to pre-select ingredients or serving sizes.

02

AI identifies ingredients and portions

Yapper turns the image into structured nutrition data and keeps the interaction short.

03

Calories and macros log instantly

Your day updates immediately so the rest of the app feels like review, not admin work.

Purpose-built tools for fast logging.

Vision

Photo Analysis

Use AI-assisted image analysis to estimate what is on the plate without database hunting.

Barcode

Barcode Scanner

Handle packaged foods fast with scan-based lookup when the meal is not homemade.

Natural Input

Voice & Text Logging

Type or say what you ate naturally and let Yapper do the parsing in the background.

Progress

Weight Trends

Track body weight and nutrition history in a cleaner interface built around signal instead of clutter.

Invest in accuracy, not subscription fatigue.

Free

Forever free

Start without a card.

  • Photo logging
  • Manual entry
  • Basic history
  • Weight tracking
